title: 5 traits the godly man builds before she arrives
caption:
He's not chasing her. He's chasing God.

And that's exactly what makes him easy to spot — he's the one building something, not scanning the room.

5 traits God grows in a man before he's ready:

1. He chases God first — you can't lead a woman closer to God if you're not moving toward him yourself.

2. He kills what's killing him — Scripture doesn't say manage your sin. It says put it to death.

3. He's planted in real men — two brothers who have his number and know his actual life.

4. He builds something worth leading — not rich, just useful. A man who can't govern himself has no business governing a home.

5. He leads himself first — self-discipline is how he knows his faith is real.

"Seek first the kingdom of God and his righteousness, and all these things will be added to you." — Matthew 6:33.

He doesn't arrive at love by chasing it. He arrives by becoming the man he was made to be.

—

Comment "first" and I'll send you the link to ETHOS.

#ethos #christianmen #faithoverfear #godlymen #manofgod #disciplineequalsfreedom #masculinity #purity #christianity #scripture
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
